title: As a Flower Blooms, So Does Hope

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And now, the announcement you've all been
waiting for! This year's Best Sprinter Award goes
to... Nishino Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! And also, for the trainer who has
always been there to support Nishino Flower...

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
We have a special award in a brand-new
category—Best Rookie Trainer! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's accomplishments have garnered
plenty of attention, so it was only natural for her
to win an award, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I never imagined I'd get one, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Congratulations, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Please say a few words for the folks here and
those watching at home!
choice_data_list: Um, I'm truly honored to receive...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmm, hmm. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Congratulations once again, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After the Sprinters Stakes, Zephyr said something
about the "future coming"...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This must've been what she meant! ♪ Oh, I'm so
thrilled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that wasn't the only thing the future had in
store for us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's kick things off for today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I begin our training session
like usual when...

text_block_list.name: New Students
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse us! Would it be okay if we trained
with you?

text_block_list.name: New Student A
text_block_list.text:
We're new students, and we're hoping you'll scout
us, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text:
I've watched all of Flower's races! She's really
incredible!

text_block_list.name: New Student B
text_block_list.text:
With everything she's achieved, there's no one
else I'd rather entrust my future to than the
trainer who guided her.

text_block_list.name: New Student C
text_block_list.text:
Same here. I'd love to be trained by you
personally.

text_block_list.name: New Students
text_block_list.text: Please grant our request!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three years ago, I never could have imagined this
many students directly requesting that I train
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's all thanks to Nishino Flower's
accomplishments, of course, so she should take
priority. I decide to talk with these new students
again later when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and work with them first, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We can continue our training later! ...I'll be
waiting in the stands. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You really okay with them butting in like that?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sky!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Did you see all that just now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure did. Looks like your trainer's built quite a
following, eh?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes! ...I couldn't be happier.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
For the longest time, I've been wishing with all my
heart that new doors would open in Trainer's
future.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That's why, seeing all those eager students...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I can't help but smile! Teehee!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But doesn't it make you jelly, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Jelly? Umm, sure, I like making jelly!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry, forget it. I guess that whole concept is
lost on you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess you didn't get forced out of training
against your will. I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, Sky? Did you come over here because you
were worried about me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now where'd you get a wild idea like that?
Though there is something I wanted to say...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's about that flower bed. Don't you think today's
the day?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After giving the new students some pointers and
finishing Nishino Flower's training session, she
leads me to...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes! I've been taking care of it, actually...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I planted seedlings to mark every race I competed
in and raised them with great care. All so that I
could show them to you someday, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot more flowers blooming here now
than there were three years ago!
choice_data_list: You started this three years ago?!
You started this three years ago?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The colorful flowers sway gently in the breeze.
Red, pink, yellow, orange, white... They
symbolize all we've been through so far.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to show you for so long, but I just
didn't know when the timing would be right.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I knew today was the day after realizing what
a remarkable trainer you've become. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to the hard work we put in together
that there are so many blooming flowers here.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
For me, seeing your smile is what makes me
happiest.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So let's continue to make even more beautiful
flowers bloom. I know we can do it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Right! Because we've both fully come into our
own! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now, go ahead and take a better look! Ask me if
you're curious about any of them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's a bellis perennis... Commonly known as
a daisy!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Raising it in this flower bed certainly wasn't easy...
But it bloomed magnificently! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time slowly flows onward as we share a quiet
moment. I hope to continue watching over
Nishino Flower's own growth...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until she blossoms into the greatest, most elegant
flower of all.
